name: Dan's Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chopped Nuts (we usually use - walnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Cream the butter and shortening together until smooth.
3. Add the sugars and beat until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing well.
5. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (if using a mixer, stir in the last four ingredients with a spoon).
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake for about 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Cool slightly before removing from the cookie sheet.
